clarity.notes: Each frame has one hero (transcript / recording column / settings section). Empty and error states explain themselves with the next action inline (codex login, participantes remotos).

hierarchy.notes: Chrome recedes: hairline borders, no shadows outside menus/modals. The 190-speaker list is height-capped so the degenerate state never outranks the transcript.

typography.notes: SF system stack (native to the macOS webview), tabular mono timestamps, 68ch reading width, real markdown care in the summary (H1 + uppercase section labels).

motion.notes: One flourish per state: pulsing rec dot, staged diarization spinner, segment fade-in on the live feed. No decorative animation elsewhere.

brand.notes: Privacy promise carried in copy and structure: 'roda 100% no dispositivo', amber cloud badges, biometric-wipe modal, no telemetry/account/cloud UI anywhere. Calm teal accent, coral (not red) recording.
